items.title: CAPA Review: High-Value Audit Event
items.description: Evidence package validation CAPA created from high-value audit signal.
items.corrective_action: Contain issue, review affected workflow, and document immediate correction.
items.preventive_action: Perform root cause review, define process control, and monitor recurrence.
